current_best_deployable: M3W-Neural v1 self-gated endpoint candidate under Stage37 safety floor

requirements.requirement: external split covers ETH/UCY/TrajNet or blockers
no leakage: future endpoint label/eval only, no central velocity, no test endpoint goals
neural model exceeds Stage37 on external all/t50/hard with easy <=2
at least two held-out external domains positive
neural without external fallback not catastrophic
requirements.evidence: fresh self-gated endpoint records no-external-fallback safe, but raw ungated endpoint remains unsafe in Stage41 reports
requirements.note: The self-gated neural output is safe; raw ungated endpoint dynamics remain unsafe and are not deployable.

requirements.requirement: all active agents future world-state, not only endpoint selector
requirements.note: Fresh source-rotation all-agent endpoint specialist now exceeds Stage37 margins on all/t50/t100/hard with easy preserved and two positive external domains. It is still endpoint-level future-state, not a full trajectory-latent world-state rollout, so the full objective remains not complete.

requirements.requirement: t100 diagnostic positive or blocker analysis

requirements.evidence: Stage41 final report: JEPA not proven unless winning trial passes; winning frozen candidate is self-gated endpoint dynamics, not JEPA contribution.

next_highest_value_actions: Train all-agent t50-specific endpoint model with domain/horizon-balanced validation rather than generic all-agent endpoint head.
Extend the fresh all-agent endpoint specialist from endpoint-only future-state to full trajectory/occupancy/interaction latent heads.
Add explicit per-neighbor future-interaction labels and multi-agent occupancy/physical-validity probes.
Run independent external split replication before accepting deployment beyond candidate status.
